rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN CAMPBELL ET AL VS. PACIFIC ARMS GOUGH STREET LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication; First Appearance Fee *Paid* For Sun Property Management
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT ROBERT TRANTER, SARAH TRANTER, MARILYN ZERBE, BRENNAN ZERBE, TINA SHIH, JOHN SHIH, SUN PROPERTY MANAGMENT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication continued to July 22, 2020 on Court's own motion. Trial is continued to September 1, 2020. If parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after July 22, 2020/September 1, 2020 respectively, parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on April 30, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN SUSTRICK VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why Injunction Should Not Issue;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 30, 2020 line 4. Order To Show Cause Why Injunction Should Not Issue DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show likelihood of prevailing on the merits and irreparable harm by competent admissible evidence. The Court provided the moving party with multiple opportunities to provide such evidence. See April 3, 2020 and April 9, 2020 Orders. = (501/CFH)
